topic: The vending machine at work dispenses snacks with my name printed on the wrappers.
title: The Vending Machine Knew My Name | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The vending machine at work started printing my name on the wrappers.
scenes.image_prompt: A glowing vending machine in a dim office break room at night, rows of snacks behind glass, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It sits in the break room on the second floor.
scenes.image_prompt: Empty office break room, single vending machine casting cold light on tiled floor, fluorescent buzz, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I buy the same snack every afternoon. Always have.
scenes.image_prompt: Close still of a vending machine keypad and coin slot, worn buttons, faint reflection, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: That day the wrapper had my full name where the brand should be.
scenes.image_prompt: A snack wrapper held in a hand, label area blurred and pale instead of branding, harsh overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I bought another. Same name. Same printing.
scenes.image_prompt: Two identical snack wrappers on a break room table, plain pale labels, cold fluorescent glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every slot, every snack, every wrapper now carried my name.
scenes.image_prompt: Vending machine interior through the glass, rows of pale wrappers all identical, cold light, faint grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked the machine after hours. The brand stickers were untouched.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand opening a vending machine service panel in dim light, wiring and racks inside, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But every product inside, behind the glass, already wore my name.
scenes.image_prompt: Close still of vending machine shelves behind glass, dozens of blank pale labels facing out, cold glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then the wrappers began listing dates. My dates. Past and future.
scenes.image_prompt: A snack wrapper on a desk showing rows of faint printed numbers, dim lamp light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the newest wrapper showed today, and a time tonight.
scenes.image_prompt: A single wrapper lit by a phone screen on a dark table, faint time-like marks on the label, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unplugged it. The screen still glowed, naming me, counting down.
scenes.image_prompt: An unplugged vending machine with its display faintly lit in a dark break room, loose cord on the floor, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I never bought one. So who keeps emptying the slots each night?
scenes.image_prompt: Vending machine at dawn with several empty slots, crumpled pale wrapper on the floor below, grey light, vertical 9:16 framing
